27002.text: Fifteen-plus reflections on the same buffer lesson produced zero meter change — the file action itself is the only lever, so this pass must be the act, not another confirmation.
240/720 hit twice from selling 100% of food proves the survival buffer is a fixed entry fee, mechanically reserved before any surplus sale, no judgment calls even at peak prices.
